mapper.insert: INSERT INTO userfollows (followerId, followingId, followStatus, isMutual, isRead, lastInteractionTime, createTime, updateTime, isDelete) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followingId}, #{followStatus}, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW(), NOW(), 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE followStatus = #{followStatus}, lastInteractionTime = NOW(), isDelete = 0, isRead = IF(#{followStatus} = 1, 0, isRead)
mapper.select: SELECT followingId FROM userfollows WHERE followerId = #{followerId} AND followStatus = 1 AND isDelete = 0
SELECT followerId FROM userfollows WHERE followingId = #{followingId} AND followStatus = 1 AND isDelete = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE userfollows SET isMutual = #{isMutual} WHERE isDelete = 0 AND ((followerId = #{userAId} AND followingId = #{userBId}) OR (followerId = #{userBId} AND followingId = #{userAId}))
